These intervals should NOT be considered actual financial advice or reliable predictions. Actual future prices could fall significantly outside these ranges due to various unpredictable market dynamics, economic events, company-specific news, and investor sentiment. Investing in stocks involves risk, and hypothetical models are not indicative of future results.
